Class SharedMultiplayerCamera

java.lang.Object
game.logic.SharedMultiplayerCamera
public final class SharedMultiplayerCamera extends Object
Represents the shared multiplayer camera.

    Nested Classes

    Class
    Description
    private static final record 
    SharedMultiplayerCamera.CameraTarget
    Immutable target state computed from tracked bounds.
